notes: Recognizable as the same squid pose with mantle left and arm crown right, but the silhouette is rough and broken with noisy photo-trace clutter rather than clean FAO ink linework.
specific_issues: broken/jagged silhouette outline along mantle and fins
noisy speckle clutter rather than focused chromatophore stipple
eye reduced to a tiny dot lacking the almond shape with pupil
tentacle club detail flattened — no ring suckers along arms
arm count and arrangement only loosely match the photo (long tentacles barely indicated)
double-line edges suggest edge-trace artifacts rather than single-weight ink
fin shape distorted — left fin reads as a rounded blob rather than the photo's pointed rhomboid
overall reads like a photo edge filter, not a scientific plate
